articles.title: 'I'll never get over watching my home burn': Belfast residents reel after night of unrest
articles.description: A night of disorder in Belfast saw people forced to flee their homes, in protests that followed a knife attack in the north of the city.

articles.title: Three arrested over Glasgow unrest and racist assaults after Belfast knife attack
articles.description: Police Scotland said members of the public were attacked "because of the colour of their skin" on Tuesday evening.

articles.title: Trump and Iran trade new threats after strikes exchanged
articles.description: The US president warns Iran "will have to pay the price" for taking too long to agree a deal, after Tehran vows retaliation to any attacks.

articles.title: Stokes out of England squad, Root named captain
articles.description: Ben Stokes will miss England’s second Test against New Zealand at The Oval following an incident in a London nightclub, with Joe Root stepping up as interim captain.
